title: PvP Essentials Modpack
description: PvP Modpack with opitmization and PvP related Mods
body:
A Modpack focused on PvP and Performance.It includes Mods for PvP and optimization and Resourcpacks for PvP.

Mods(no optimization Mods listed):

- InventoryHUD+
- Camera enhancements
- BactroMod
- not enough Animations
- AppleSkin
- Crosshair Indicator
- more chat history
- Shulkerbox Tooltip
- RemoveReloadingScreen
- Zoomify

Texturepacks:

- Speacs PvP Essentials
- Speacs low shield
- Speacs small shield
